meta.title: Developer Maxim Bananin
meta.description: Turnkey IT solution development. Automate routine tasks and attract clients using your website.

en.tgMessage: Hello. I would like to discuss a project.
en.work: Python Backend Engineer | Automation • APIs • Web Scraping
en.main_info: I design and build backend systems, automation tools, and data-driven applications using Python. From scraping and bots to APIs and scalable backend services — I turn manual processes into reliable, automated systems.
en.main_desc: Fast, clean and maintainable solutions using Python, FastAPI, Django and modern backend stack.

about.title: About Me
about.info:
I am a Python backend developer focused on building practical and scalable solutions for real-world problems.
My main areas are:
• backend development
• API design and integration
• web scraping and data extraction
• automation and bots
• system integrations and Linux-based deployments

I prefer clean architecture, stable systems and predictable behavior in production environments.
I work with both small automation tasks and full backend systems — from idea to deployment.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: I don’t just write scripts — I build systems that work in production.

item0.title: Telegram Bot Development
item0.desc: Custom Telegram bots built to streamline business processes and automate workflows. From simple lead generation and feedback bots to sophisticated systems featuring database integration, custom APIs, automated notifications, and user dashboards. Your bot will serve as a seamless, 24/7 interface for managing internal tools, data storage, document generation, and customer support.

item1.title: Web & Web Service Development
item1.desc: End-to-end development of modern web projects tailored to your needs—including landing pages, corporate websites, client portals, custom CRMs, and complex web applications. Every project is optimized for performance, robust security, and exceptional user experience. I handle the entire lifecycle, transforming your initial concept into a fully launched, production-ready product.

item2.title: Bug Fixing & Code Refactoring
item2.desc: Professional support to scale and maintain your existing software. I diagnose and eliminate bugs, enhance system stability, optimize performance, and improve code architecture. Effective refactoring minimizes technical debt, simplifies future feature updates, and significantly reduces long-term maintenance costs.

item3.title: Workflow & Process Automation
item3.desc: Custom automation solutions designed to eliminate repetitive, time-consuming tasks. If your team spends hours on manual spreadsheet processing, document generation, data migration, or reporting, these workflows can be fully automated. Automation drastically reduces human error, accelerates operations, and frees up valuable time for strategic growth.

item4.title: Project Deployment & Server Setup
item4.desc: Reliable cloud and dedicated server configuration to ensure your applications run flawlessly. I handle the deployment of web services, Telegram bots, and backend systems with a strict focus on security, automated backups, proactive monitoring, and fault tolerance. You get a production-ready, resilient infrastructure prepared for real-world traffic.

stack.title: Tech Stack
stack.devops: DevOps: Docker, Nginx, Linux, Supervisor, ELK
stack.other: Other: OpenCV, PIL, aiogram, Telegram Bot API
stack.philosophy:
I focus on building systems that are:
• reliable under real usage
• easy to maintain and extend
• optimized for performance
• production-ready from day one

portfolio.title: Portfolio & Case Studies
portfolio.action_desc: Let's discuss your project and find the optimal stack.

item1.title: E-commerce Store Backend
item1.desc: Full-featured shopping solution with complex payment integrations and order management systems.

item2.title: High-Load Custom Scraper
item2.desc: Automated data extraction system processing millions of rows daily with proxy rotation.

item3.title: B2B Contractor Search Platform
item3.desc: Developed a high-load marketplace with dual-role accounts, real-time chat, and a rating system. Delivered full-cycle production: from custom design implementation to secure server setup, domain routing, and fault-tolerant hosting deployment within a strict 3-month deadline.
item3.stack: Python, DRF, Vue.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Nginx, Websocket

item4.title: CNC Automation Software
item4.desc: Engineered a CAD automation tool that dynamically embeds continuous-contour text into production templates. Eliminated manual drafting, reducing processing time from 10 minutes to seconds per part, saving the US-based client $30 per order in operational costs.

item0.title: Novel Translation Platform Optimization
item0.desc: Took over an existing high-traffic media platform to resolve scaling and geo-blocking crises. Implemented smart country-based routing and traffic optimization, achieving 100% server stability and eliminating the need for costly infrastructure migrations.

contacts.title: Get in Touch
contacts.desc: Have a project in mind or need a consultation? Choose the most convenient way to reach out.

footer.tagline: I create fast and user-friendly services.
